annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Kan. Stat. Ann. 16-204, currently 8.25% for July 1, 2025–June 30, 2026 (recomputed each July 1 off the prior year's discount-rate formula). Simple interest. Prejudgment interest is separate — see the Kansas prejudgment page (10% general; a lower tort rate for recent tort actions). Verify at sos.ks.gov; not legal advice.
